repo.title: GitHub - mantinedev/next-app-template: Mantine + Next.js app router template (7.0+) · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Mantine Next App Template
manifest_entry.focus: clean React and Next.js starter ergonomics
teaches: clean starter structure for React and Next.js projects
Mantine theme wiring and styling ergonomics
maintainable defaults for teams moving quickly
how to start polished without overcomplicating the stack
avoid: letting starter defaults define the entire product personality
keeping framework-demo aesthetics instead of shaping the interface intentionally
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: A clean starter for products that want strong ergonomics and calm defaults.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: A simple starter is powerful when it stays easy to reshape into a product with real taste.
